title: SpaceMemberOp::Upsert role unchecked at type level
description: SpaceMemberOp::Upsert { role: &str } accepts any string. Validation lives only in jmap.rs Phase 1 (validate_member_patch). A future caller constructing SpaceMemberOp directly — e.g. a new invite-promotion endpoint or a bulk-import path — can produce an invalid role that reaches upsert_space_member_with_role and gets stored verbatim. The store's precondition doc comment documents the invariant but the type system does not enforce it. An enum Role { Admin, Moderator, Member } would eliminate this class of bug at compile time. As a solo maintainer this will silently bite you when you wire up a second call site.
